description: Fix forecast showing empty (0 items) and fix saldo sync issues caused by incorrect journal creation and nominal string handling
steps: Step 1: Fix renderForecastBayar() filter in keuangan-app.js (around line 3133). The current filter at line `if (x.jurnalId && jurnalIds.indexOf(x.jurnalId) !== -1) return false;` MUST be changed so that items with jatuhTempo > todayStr are ALWAYS included in forecast regardless of jurnalId. The new logic should be: (a) if sumber is import-sheets, exclude; (b) if jatuhTempo > today, ALWAYS include (this is the main forecast purpose - show future payments regardless of status or jurnalId); (c) if jatuhTempo <= today OR no jatuhTempo: exclude only if already properly journalized (has valid jurnalId AND status is Approved Final); otherwise include (pending items, items without journal, etc).

Step 2: Fix renderForecastTerima() filter in keuangan-app.js (around line 3165). Same logic as Step 1 but for dana masuk. The current filter excludes items with valid jurnalId. Fix: if tanggal > today, ALWAYS include. If tanggal <= today or no tanggal: exclude only if properly journalized AND Approved Final.

Step 3: Fix integrasiPermohonanDanaMasukKeJurnal() in keuangan-app.js (around line 2005-2012). Add jatuhTempo check to the pdBelumJurnal filter. The filter currently only checks status === 'Approved Final' and whether jurnalId exists. Add condition: ONLY include items where jatuhTempo is present AND jatuhTempo <= todayStr (today). Items with future jatuhTempo must NOT be journalized by the manual button. Same fix for dmBelumJurnal filter using d.tanggal field.

Step 4: Fix nominal to use parseFloat in integrasiPermohonanDanaMasukKeJurnal(). In the journal creation section for permohonan (around line 2040-2050), change all occurrences of `p.nominal` in journal lines to `parseFloat(p.nominal)||0`. Specifically: lines array debit/kredit values, totalDebit, totalKredit. Same for dana masuk section: change `d.nominal` to `parseFloat(d.nominal)||0`.

Step 5: Fix nominal to use parseFloat in autoJurnalJatuhTempo(). In the journal creation for permohonan (around line 2145-2155), change `p.nominal` to `parseFloat(p.nominal)||0` in lines debit/kredit, totalDebit, totalKredit. Same for dana masuk: change `d.nominal` to `parseFloat(d.nominal)||0`.

Step 6: Fix viewBankRecDetail() saldo calculation (around line 5544). The line `totalDebit += l.debit||0; totalKredit += l.kredit||0;` should use parseFloat: `totalDebit += parseFloat(l.debit)||0; totalKredit += parseFloat(l.kredit)||0;` to ensure consistent saldo calculation even if journal entries have string values.
acceptance_criteria: renderForecastBayar() shows ALL permohonan with jatuhTempo > today regardless of jurnalId or status
renderForecastBayar() shows pending/draft/non-Approved items even if jatuhTempo <= today
renderForecastBayar() only excludes items that are Approved Final AND jatuhTempo <= today AND have valid jurnalId
renderForecastTerima() follows same logic for dana masuk
integrasiPermohonanDanaMasukKeJurnal() only creates journals for items where jatuhTempo <= today
All journal creation uses parseFloat(nominal)||0 for debit/kredit/total values
viewBankRecDetail uses parseFloat for saldo calculation
